SUBJECT: Oops...

<firstname>

I made a mistake yesterday...

I put up a post on my copywriting blog yesterday
answering some of the common questions that have
been pouring in about my new "Copy That Sells"
course.

One of the questions I answered is "when is launch
day?".

And this is where the "oops" comes in... instead
of typing "October 18th", I typed "November
18th"!!!

So PLEASE - the correct date is:


  >> OCTOBER 18th at noon eastern time <<


That is coming up quickly - it's just a couple of
days away.

I'm sorry for any confusion... it has just been crazy
here as we get ready for this launch. 

(In fact, we actually have all kinds of people
wanting to buy right now and sneak to the front of
the line.)

To keep everyone up-to-date on everything, I have
been making frequent posts to the blog:

http://blog.creatingcopythatsells.info


Keep an eye on that spot... I just put a post up
there about one of the outrageous bonuses that we
have for the program, as well as the huge
Gradation Gift I will be sending to people that
complete this program.


best regards,
Bill Glazer

P.S. You might be wondering why people are so hot
and bothered to get onboard with this program as
soon as it launches.

Well, I personally think they should be excited
about what the program is going to do for their
bottom line. That is the REAL life-changing story
here.

However, I have a feeling it has more to do with
the "over-the-top" bonuses I am offering to the
"early birds" that sign up right away the minute
we go live.

At last count there were 16 bonuses, and most of
these are bonuses that you can't buy anywhere, at
any price. Not to mention that Graduation Gift.

In any case, I will gradually be revealing more
about this on the blog... I can't dump it all on
you at once, because I am afraid of the
consequences. In any case, you can watch all the
developments here:

http://blog.creatingcopythatsells.info
